SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
WITH Dates AS(
	SELECT
		current_date() AS RunTime
		,concat(lpad(year(current_date()), 4, '0'), lpad(month(current_date()), 2, '0')) AS ReportPeriod
		,year(current_date()) AS ReportPeriodYear
)
,GoldProvider AS(
	SELECT * 
	FROM (
			SELECT *,
				ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY ProviderID ORDER BY ProviderID) AS RowNumber
			FROM
				Provider
		)
	WHERE RowNumber = 1
)
,WorkAlertLineDetail AS(
	SELECT
		'#clientCode' AS clientCode
		,'MA' AS LOB
		,pm.FirstName pcpProviderFirstName
		,pm.LastName pcpProviderLastName
		,pm.ProviderID AS pcpProviderID
		,pm.NPI AS pcpProviderNPI
		,pm1.FirstName apptProviderFirstName
		,pm1.LastName apptProviderLastName
		,pm1.ProviderID AS apptProviderID
		,pm1.NPI AS apptProviderNPI
		,wf.AltProviderFirstName
		,wf.AltProviderLastName
		,ae.AlertID
		,ae.PlanMemberId
		,wf.AppointmentDate
		,wf.CDIReceivedDate
		,wf.AppointmentDate AS FilterDate
		,at.AppointmentTypeDesc
		,ae.CDIAlertEntityID
		,wf.CDIAlertWorkflowID
		,ag.AlertGroupID
		,ag.AlertGroupCode
		,aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID
		,wf.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID
		,wfs.CDIAlertStatusDesc
		,CASE
			WHEN aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID IS NULL THEN 0
			WHEN wf.AppointmentTypeID = 3 THEN 0
			WHEN (
				aro.AlertResponseOptionText <> 'Not Delivered'
				OR aro.AlertResponseOptionText IS NULL
				) THEN 1
				ELSE 0
			END IsConditionIdentified
		,CASE
			WHEN aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID IS NULL THEN 0
			WHEN wf.AppointmentTypeID = 3 THEN 0
			WHEN '#clientCode' = 'Emblem'
				AND aro.AlertResponseOptionText <> 'Not Delivered'
				AND (
					fqr.CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID IS NULL
					OR fqr.CDIAlertQueryResponseID NOT IN (1, 75)
					) THEN 1
			WHEN '#clientCode' <> 'Emblem' --ADDED TO BE SAFE - DTE 20200626
				AND aro.AlertResponseOptionText <> 'Not Delivered'
				AND aro.AlertResponseType <> 'N/A'
				AND (
					fqr.CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID IS NULL
					OR fqr.CDIAlertQueryResponseID NOT IN (1, 75)
					) THEN 1
			ELSE 0
			END IsConditionAddressed
		,wf.AppointmentTypeID
		,wfr.AlertResponseOptionID
		,aro.AlertResponseOptionText
		,aro.AlertResponseType
		,qc.CDIAlertQueryCodeID
		,qc.CDIAlertQueryCodeDesc CDIAlertQueryDesc
		,qr.CDIAlertQueryResponseID
		,qr.CDIAlertQueryResponseDesc
		,CASE WHEN year(wf.AppointmentDate) = year(current_date()) then 1 else 0 END apptCurrYTD
		,CASE WHEN year(wf.CDIReceivedDate) = year(current_date()) then 1 else 0 END recCurrYTD
		,wf.DeliveryDate
		,wf.QueryReceivedFromCoderDate QueryReceivedFromCoderDate
		,wf.QueryForwardedToDoctorDate QueryForwardedToDoctorDate
		,wf.QueryResponseReceivedDate QueryResponseReceivedDate
		,exc.CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
		,CASE WHEN wf.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID in (175) THEN exc.ExceptionOptionText ELSE NULL END ExceptionReason
		,sum(CASE WHEN fqr.CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Queries_Distributed
		,sum(CASE WHEN qr.CDIAlertQueryResponseID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) Queries_Returned
		,cast(NULL as string) Market
		,cast(NULL as string) pcpGroupingID
		,cast(NULL as string) pcpGroupingDesc
		,cast(NULL as string) pcpParentGroupingID
		,cast(NULL as string) pcpParentGroupingDesc
		,cast(NULL as string) pcpProviderMiddleInitial
		,cast(NULL as string) pcpProviderTIN
		,cast(NULL as string) apptMarket
		,cast(NULL as string) apptGroupingID
		,cast(NULL as string) apptGroupingDesc
		,cast(NULL as string) apptParentGroupingID
		,cast(NULL as string) apptParentGroupingDesc
		,cast(NULL as string) apptProviderMiddleInitial
		,cast(NULL as string) apptProviderTIN
		,cast(NULL as string) initialMedicalRecordReviewID
		,cast(NULL as date) MRRReviewDate
		,cast(NULL as string) ContractNumber
		,cast(NULL as string) SubscriberID
		,cast(NULL as string) Relationship
		,cast(NULL as string) AgeModel
		,cast(NULL as string) BusinessEntity
		,cast(NULL as string) LineOfBusiness
		,cast(NULL as string) MetalLevel
		,cast(NULL as string) PlanType
		,cast(NULL as string) Star_Diagnosis_HCC
		,cast(NULL as string) AlertLineText
		FROM
				(
					SELECT
							ae.*,
							mm.MemberId AS PlanMemberId
					FROM
							CDIAlertEntity ae
							LEFT JOIN tblMemberMaster mm ON ae.MemberMasterId = mm.MemberMaster_wk
				) ae
				INNER JOIN (
						SELECT
								aw.*,
								pm.ProviderId
						FROM
								CDIAlertWorkflow aw
								LEFT JOIN tblProviderMaster pm ON aw.ProviderMasterId = pm.ProviderMaster_wk
				) wf ON ae.CDIAlertEntityID = wf.CDIAlertEntityID
					AND wf.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID >= 1
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertEntityDetail aed ON ae.CDIAlertEntityID = aed.CDIAlertEntityID
				LEFT JOIN AlertGroup ag ON aed.AlertGroupID = ag.AlertGroupID
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertWorkflowStatus wfs ON wf.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID = wfs.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertWorkflowResponse wfr ON aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID = wfr.CDIAlertEntityDetailID
					AND wf.CDIAlertWorkflowID = wfr.CDIAlertWorkflowID
				LEFT JOIN AlertResponseOption aro ON wfr.AlertResponseOptionID = aro.AlertResponseOptionID
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertWorkflowQuery fqr ON aed.cdialertentitydetailid = fqr.cdialertentitydetailid
					AND wf.cdialertworkflowid = fqr.cdialertworkflowid
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertQueryResponse qr ON fqr.cdialertqueryresponseid = qr.cdialertqueryresponseid
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertQueryCode qc ON fqr.CDIAlertQueryCodeID = qc.CDIAlertQueryCodeID
				LEFT JOIN AppointmentType at ON wf.AppointmentTypeID = at.AppointmentTypeID
				LEFT JOIN GoldProvider pm ON wf.ProviderId = pm.ProviderId
				LEFT JOIN GoldProvider pm1 ON wf.AppointmentProviderMasterID = pm1.ProviderId
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOption exc ON wfr.AlertResponseOptionID = exc.CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				CROSS JOIN Dates d
		WHERE
				CASE
						WHEN year(wf.AppointmentDate) = d.ReportPeriodYear THEN 1
						WHEN year(wf.CDIReceivedDate) = d.ReportPeriodYear THEN 1
						ELSE 0
				END = 1
				AND wf.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID > 0
		GROUP BY
				ae.AlertID
				,ae.PlanMemberId
				,pm.FirstName
				,pm.LastName
				,pm.ProviderID
				,pm.NPI
				,pm1.FirstName
				,pm1.LastName
				,pm1.ProviderID
				,pm1.NPI
				,wf.AltProviderFirstName
				,wf.AltProviderLastName
				,wf.AppointmentDate
				,wf.CDIReceivedDate
				,CASE
						WHEN '#clientCode' = 'TSA' THEN wf.CDIReceivedDate
						ELSE wf.AppointmentDate
				END
				,at.AppointmentTypeDesc
				,ae.CDIAlertEntityID
				,wf.CDIAlertWorkflowID
				,wf.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,wfs.CDIAlertStatusDesc
				,ag.AlertGroupID
				,ag.AlertGroupCode
				,aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID
				,qc.CDIAlertQueryCodeID
				,qc.CDIAlertQueryCodeDesc
				,qr.CDIAlertQueryResponseID
				,qr.CDIAlertQueryResponseDesc
				,CASE
						WHEN aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID IS NULL THEN 0
						WHEN wf.AppointmentTypeID = 3 THEN 0
						WHEN (
								aro.AlertResponseOptionText <> 'Not Delivered'
								OR aro.AlertResponseOptionText IS NULL
						) THEN 1
						ELSE 0
				END
				,CASE
						WHEN aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID IS NULL THEN 0
						WHEN wf.AppointmentTypeID = 3 THEN 0
						WHEN '#clientCode' = 'Emblem'
						AND aro.AlertResponseOptionText <> 'Not Delivered'
						AND (
								fqr.CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID IS NULL
								OR fqr.CDIAlertQueryResponseID NOT IN (1, 75)
						) THEN 1
						WHEN '#clientCode' <> 'Emblem'
						AND aro.AlertResponseOptionText <> 'Not Delivered'
						AND aro.AlertResponseType <> 'N/A'
						AND (
								fqr.CDIAlertWorkflowQueryID IS NULL
								OR fqr.CDIAlertQueryResponseID NOT IN (1, 75)
						) THEN 1
						ELSE 0
				END
				,wf.AppointmentTypeID
				,wfr.AlertResponseOptionID
				,aro.AlertResponseOptionText
				,aro.AlertResponseType
				,wf.QueryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,wf.QueryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,wf.QueryResponseReceivedDate
				,wf.DeliveryDate
				,exc.CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,CASE
						WHEN wf.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID in (175) THEN exc.ExceptionOptionText
						ELSE NULL
				END
)
,WorkMinCDIAlertWorkflowRecordReview AS(
		SELECT
				'#clientCode' AS clientCode
				,'MA' AS LOB
				,CDIAlertWorkflowID
				,min(MedicalRecordReviewID) AS MinReviewID
		FROM
				CDIAlertWorkflowRecordReview
		GROUP BY
				CDIAlertWorkflowID
)
,UpdateAlertLineDetailOne AS(
		SELECT
				'#clientCode' AS clientCode
				,'MA' AS LOB
				,w.Market
				,w.pcpProviderID
				,w.pcpProviderNPI
				,w.apptProviderID
				,w.AlertID
				,w.PlanMemberId
				,w.AppointmentDate
				,w.CDIReceivedDate
				,w.FilterDate
				,w.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,w.MRRReviewDate
				,w.AppointmentTypeDesc
				,w.CDIAlertEntityID
				,w.CDIAlertWorkflowID
				,w.AlertGroupID
				,w.AlertGroupCode
				,w.CDIAlertEntityDetailID
				,w.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,w.CDIAlertStatusDesc
				,w.IsConditionIdentified
				,w.IsConditionAddressed
				,w.AppointmentTypeID
				,w.AlertResponseOptionID
				,w.AlertResponseOptionText
				,w.AlertResponseType
				,w.CDIAlertQueryCodeID
				,w.CDIAlertQueryDesc
				,w.Queries_Distributed
				,w.CDIAlertQueryResponseID
				,w.CDIAlertQueryResponseDesc
				,w.Queries_Returned
				,w.apptCurrYTD
				,w.recCurrYTD
				,w.DeliveryDate
				,w.QueryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,w.QueryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,w.QueryResponseReceivedDate
				,w.ContractNumber
				,w.SubscriberID
				,w.Relationship
				,w.AgeModel
				,w.BusinessEntity
				,w.LineOfBusiness
				,w.MetalLevel
				,w.PlanType
				,w.CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,w.ExceptionReason
				,w.Star_Diagnosis_HCC
				,w.AlertLineText
				,g1.GroupingID AS apptGroupingID
				,g1.GroupingDesc AS apptGroupingDesc
				,g1.ParentGroupingID AS apptParentGroupingID
				,g1.ParentGroupingDesc AS apptParentGroupingDesc
		FROM
				WorkAlertLineDetail w
				INNER JOIN CDIAlertWorkflow wf ON w.CDIAlertWorkflowID = wf.CDIAlertWorkflowID
																				AND year(wf.CreatedDateTime) >= year(current_date)
				LEFT JOIN GroupingIDs g1 ON wf.GroupingID = g1.GroupingID
)
,UpdateAlertLineDetailTwo AS(
		SELECT
				ald.clientCode
				,ald.LOB
				,ald.Market
				,ald.pcpProviderID
				,ald.pcpProviderNPI
				,ald.apptProviderID
				,ald.AlertID
				,ald.PlanMemberId
				,ald.AppointmentDate
				,ald.CDIReceivedDate
				,ald.FilterDate
				,ald.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,ald.MRRReviewDate
				,ald.AppointmentTypeDesc
				,ald.CDIAlertEntityID
				,ald.CDIAlertWorkflowID
				,ald.AlertGroupID
				,ald.AlertGroupCode
				,ald.CDIAlertEntityDetailID
				,ald.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,ald.CDIAlertStatusDesc
				,ald.IsConditionIdentified
				,ald.IsConditionAddressed
				,ald.AppointmentTypeID
				,ald.AlertResponseOptionID
				,ald.AlertResponseOptionText
				,ald.AlertResponseType
				,ald.CDIAlertQueryCodeID
				,ald.CDIAlertQueryDesc
				,ald.Queries_Distributed
				,ald.CDIAlertQueryResponseID
				,ald.CDIAlertQueryResponseDesc
				,ald.Queries_Returned
				,ald.apptCurrYTD
				,ald.recCurrYTD
				,ald.DeliveryDate
				,ald.QueryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,ald.QueryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,ald.QueryResponseReceivedDate
				,ald.ContractNumber
				,ald.SubscriberID
				,ald.Relationship
				,ald.AgeModel
				,ald.BusinessEntity
				,ald.LineOfBusiness
				,ald.MetalLevel
				,ald.PlanType
				,ald.CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,ald.ExceptionReason
				,aed.AlertLineText AS AlertLineText
				,CASE
						WHEN aed.RecordType = 'HCC' THEN ph.HCC
						ELSE aed.StarOrDiagnosisCode
				 END AS Star_Diagnosis_HCC
				,aed.RecordType
		FROM
				UpdateAlertLineDetailOne ald
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertEntityDetail aed ON ald.CDIAlertEntityDetailID = aed.CDIAlertEntityDetailID
				LEFT JOIN PotentialHCC ph ON ph.RecordID = aed.RecordID
)
,UpdateAlertLineDetailThree AS(
		SELECT
				a.clientCode
				,a.LOB
				,a.Market
				,a.pcpProviderID
				,a.pcpProviderNPI
				,a.apptProviderID
				,a.AlertID
				,a.PlanMemberId
				,a.AppointmentDate
				,a.CDIReceivedDate
				,a.FilterDate
				,mrr.MedicalRecordReviewID AS initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,CAST(mrr.CreatedDateTime AS DATE) AS MRRReviewDate
				,a.AppointmentTypeDesc
				,a.CDIAlertEntityID
				,a.CDIAlertWorkflowID
				,a.AlertGroupID
				,a.AlertGroupCode
				,a.CDIAlertEntityDetailID
				,a.CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,a.CDIAlertStatusDesc
				,a.IsConditionIdentified
				,a.IsConditionAddressed
				,a.AppointmentTypeID
				,a.AlertResponseOptionID
				,a.AlertResponseOptionText
				,a.AlertResponseType
				,a.CDIAlertQueryCodeID
				,a.CDIAlertQueryDesc
				,a.Queries_Distributed
				,a.CDIAlertQueryResponseID
				,a.CDIAlertQueryResponseDesc
				,a.Queries_Returned
				,a.apptCurrYTD AS isApptDateCurrentYear
				,a.recCurrYTD AS isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,a.DeliveryDate
				,a.QueryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,a.QueryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,a.QueryResponseReceivedDate
				,a.ContractNumber
				,a.SubscriberID
				,a.Relationship
				,a.AgeModel
				,a.BusinessEntity
				,a.LineOfBusiness
				,a.MetalLevel
				,a.PlanType
				,a.CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,a.ExceptionReason
				,a.Star_Diagnosis_HCC
				,a.RecordType
				,a.AlertLineText
		FROM
				UpdateAlertLineDetailTwo a
				LEFT JOIN WorkMinCDIAlertWorkflowRecordReview rr ON a.CDIAlertWorkflowID = rr.CDIAlertWorkflowID
						AND a.clientCode = rr.clientCode
						AND a.LOB = rr.LOB
				LEFT JOIN MedicalRecordReview mrr ON rr.MinReviewID = mrr.MedicalRecordReviewID
						AND mrr.reviewstatusid <> 13
						AND year(mrr.CreatedDateTime) >= year(current_date)
)
,CDIStatus AS(
		SELECT
				t.clientCode
				,t.LOB
				,t.AlertID
				,t.CDIAlertWorkflowID
				,CASE
						WHEN t.CDIReceivedDate IS NOT NULL
							AND (t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1 
										OR t.AppointmentTypeDesc = 'Walk-In, No CDI Generated')
							AND t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified + t.StarGapsIdentified = 0 THEN 'Blank or No CDI – Appointment Complete'
						WHEN t.CDIReceivedDate > date_add(t.AppointmentDate, 14)
							AND t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1
							AND t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified > 0 THEN 'CDI Returned – Not Compliant (late)'
						WHEN t.CDIReceivedDate IS NOT NULL
							AND t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1
							AND t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified > 0
							AND t.ConditionsAddressed + t.OpportunitesAddressed + t.StarGapsAddressed = 0 THEN 'CDI Returned – Not Compliant (nothing addressed)'
						WHEN ( t.CDIReceivedDate > date_add(t.AppointmentDate, 14)
										OR t.StarGapsAddressed = 0)
							AND t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1
							AND t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified = 0
							AND t.StarGapsIdentified > 0 THEN 'STAR Gaps Only – CDI Returned – Not Compliant'
						WHEN t.CDIReceivedDate <= date_add(t.AppointmentDate, 14)
							AND t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1
							AND t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified = 0
							AND t.StarGapsIdentified > 0
							AND t.StarGapsAddressed > 0 THEN 'STAR Gaps Only – CDI Returned – Compliant'
						WHEN t.CDIReceivedDate <= date_add(t.AppointmentDate, 14)
							AND t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1
							AND t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified > 0
							AND t.ConditionsAddressed + t.OpportunitesAddressed = t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified THEN 'CDI Returned – Compliant (100% addressed)'
						WHEN t.CDIReceivedDate <= date_add(t.AppointmentDate, 14)
							AND t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1
							AND t.ConditionsIdentified + t.OpportunitesIdentified > 0
							AND t.ConditionsAddressed + t.OpportunitesAddressed + t.StarGapsAddressed > 0 THEN 'CDI Returned – Compliant'
						WHEN t.CDIReceivedDate IS NULL
							AND t.ApptTypeDescRRPPE = 1
							AND t.AppointmentDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'CDI Not Returned'
						ELSE 'NONE'
				END AS CDIStatus
		FROM
				(
						SELECT
								clientCode
								,LOB
								,AlertID
								,CDIAlertWorkflowID
								,CDIReceivedDate
								,AppointmentDate
								,AppointmentTypeDesc
								,CASE WHEN AppointmentTypeDesc in (
									'Regular, CDI Generated Prior to Appt.'
									,'Regular, Blank CDI'
									,'Pre-Print Office'
									,'Pre-Print Office, Blank CDI'
									,'Electronic PEC'
								 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ApptTypeDescRRPPE 
								,sum(CASE WHEN AlertGroupCode = 'DC' THEN IsConditionIdentified ELSE 0 END) AS ConditionsIdentified
								,sum(CASE WHEN AlertGroupCode = 'OPP' THEN IsConditionIdentified ELSE 0 END) AS OpportunitesIdentified
								,sum(CASE WHEN AlertGroupCode = 'STAR' THEN IsConditionIdentified ELSE 0 END) AS StarGapsIdentified
								,sum(CASE WHEN AlertGroupCode = 'DC' THEN IsConditionAddressed ELSE 0 END) AS ConditionsAddressed
								,sum(CASE WHEN AlertGroupCode = 'OPP' THEN IsConditionAddressed ELSE 0 END) AS OpportunitesAddressed
								,sum(CASE WHEN AlertGroupCode = 'STAR' THEN IsConditionAddressed ELSE 0 END) AS StarGapsAddressed
						FROM
								UpdateAlertLineDetailThree
						GROUP BY
								AlertID
								,CDIAlertWorkflowID
								,CDIReceivedDate
								,AppointmentDate
								,AppointmentTypeDesc
								,clientCode
								,LOB
								,CASE WHEN AppointmentTypeDesc in (
									'Regular, CDI Generated Prior to Appt.'
									,'Regular, Blank CDI'
									,'Pre-Print Office'
									,'Pre-Print Office, Blank CDI'
									,'Electronic PEC'
								 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END 
				) t
)
,cdiAlertLineBase AS(
		SELECT
				al.*
				,cs.CDIStatus
				,d.RunTime AS SnapshotDate
				,d.ReportPeriod
		FROM
				UpdateAlertLineDetailThree al
				INNER JOIN CDIStatus cs ON al.clientCode = cs.clientCode
					AND al.LOB = cs.LOB
					AND al.AlertID = cs.AlertID
					AND cs.CDIAlertWorkflowID = al.CDIAlertWorkflowID
				CROSS JOIN Dates d
)
-- BIS-2483 logic --
,PECDW_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				DISTINCT ald.alertID
				,ald.clientCode
				,ald.LOB
				,ald.snapshotDate
				,CAST(ald.cdiAlertEntityDetailID AS BIGINT) AS cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,CAST(ald.cdiAlertEntityID AS BIGINT) AS cdiAlertEntityID
				,m.planMemberID
				,concat(m.lastName, ', ', m.firstName) AS memberName
				,m.dateOfBirth as memberDateOfBirth
				,ald.pcpProviderID
				,ald.pcpProviderNPI
				,ald.apptProviderID
				,Queries_Distributed AS queriesDistributed
				,Queries_Returned AS queriesReturned
				,ald.appointmentDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeID
				,ald.cdiReceivedDate
				,CAST(ald.initialMedicalRecordReviewID AS BIGINT) AS initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,ald.mrrReviewDate
				,ald.alertResponseOptionID
				,ald.isApptDateCurrentYear AS isApptDateCurrentYear
				,ald.isReceivedDateCurrentYear AS isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,ald.deliveryDate
				,ald.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,ald.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,ald.queryResponseReceivedDate
				,ald.alertLineText
				,ald.alertGroupID
				,CASE
						UPPER(RecordType)
						WHEN 'HCC' THEN Star_Diagnosis_HCC
						ELSE NULL
				END AS hcc
				,CASE
						UPPER(RecordType)
						WHEN 'DIAG' THEN Star_Diagnosis_HCC
						ELSE NULL
				END AS icd
				,ald.isConditionIdentified AS isConditionIdentified
				,ald.isConditionAddressed AS isConditionAddressed
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,ald.alertResponseOptionText
				,ald.alertResponseType
				,ald.reportPeriod
				,ald.filterDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeDesc
				,ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,ald.cdiStatus
		FROM
				cdiAlertLineBase ald
				LEFT JOIN Member m ON m.PlanMemberId = ald.PlanMemberId
						AND ald.LOB = 'MA'
		WHERE
				YEAR(ald.FilterDate) = LEFT(ald.ReportPeriod, 4)
				AND month(ald.FilterDate) <= RIGHT(ald.ReportPeriod, 2)
)
,TMP_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				DISTINCT cast(rb.POCode as string) as attributedPOCode
				,cast(rb.POName as string) as attributedPOName
				,cast(rb.PracticeCode as string) as attributedPracticeCode
				,cast(rb.PracticeName as string) as attributedPracticeName
				,rb.market as attributedMarket
				,cast(rb.Engagement as string) as attributedEngagement
				,rb.providerNPI as attributedNPI
				,CASE
						WHEN rb.providerNPI = ald.pcpProviderNPI THEN ald.pcpProviderID
						ELSE NULL
					END AS attributedProviderID
				,CAST(providerName as string) as attributedProviderName
				,ald.alertID
				,ald.clientCode
				,ald.LOB
				,ald.snapshotDate
				,ald.cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,ald.cdiAlertEntityID
				,ald.planMemberID
				,ald.memberName
				,ald.memberDateOfBirth
				,ald.pcpProviderID
				,ald.apptProviderID
				,ald.queriesDistributed
				,ald.queriesReturned
				,ald.appointmentDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeID
				,ald.cdiReceivedDate
				,ald.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,ald.mrrReviewDate
				,ald.alertResponseOptionID
				,ald.isApptDateCurrentYear
				,ald.isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,ald.deliveryDate
				,ald.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,ald.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,ald.queryResponseReceivedDate
				,ald.alertLineText
				,ald.alertGroupID
				,ald.hcc
				,ald.icd
				,ald.isConditionIdentified
				,ald.isConditionAddressed
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,ald.alertResponseOptionText
				,ald.alertResponseType
				,ald.reportPeriod
				,ald.filterDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeDesc
				,ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,ald.cdiStatus
				,CASE
						WHEN month(ald.FilterDate) = RIGHT(ald.ReportPeriod, 2) THEN 1
						ELSE 0
					END AS currentMonthFlag
				,rb.isActive as currentlyActive
				,replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(ald.appointmentTypeDesc, ' ', ''), ',', ''), '-', ''), '.', ''), '–', '') AS appointmentTypeDesc_Join
				,replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc, ' ', ''), ',', ''), '-', ''), '.', ''), '–', '') AS cdiAlertStatusDesc_Join
				,replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(ald.cdiStatus, ' ', ''), ',', ''), '-', ''), '.', ''), '–', '') AS cdiStatus_Join
		FROM
				PECDW_AlertLineDetail ald
				LEFT JOIN pecReportBase rb ON ald.PlanMemberId = rb.PlanMemberId
				AND ald.reportPeriod = rb.reportPeriod
				AND ald.LOB = 'MA'
)
,MetricDefs AS (
		SELECT
				a.client
			 ,a.market
			 ,a.metric
			 ,a.appointmentTypeDesc
			 ,b.cdiAlertStatusDesc
			 ,c.cdiStatus
			 ,a.appointmentTypeDesc_USE
			 ,b.cdiAlertStatusDesc_USE
			 ,c.cdiStatus_USE
			 ,cast((a.CountFlag * b.CountFlag * c.CountFlag) as int) as countFlag
		FROM
				AppointmentTypeDesc a
				LEFT JOIN CDIAlertStatusDesc b ON a.Client = b.Client
						AND a.Metric = b.Metric
						AND ifnull(a.Market, '') = ifnull(b.Market, '')
				LEFT JOIN PECCDIStatus c ON a.Client = c.Client
						AND a.Metric = c.Metric
						AND ifnull(a.Market, '') = ifnull(c.Market, '')
		WHERE
				UPPER(a.Client) = UPPER('#clientCode')
)
,Final_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				ald.attributedPOCode
				,ald.attributedPOName
				,ald.attributedPracticeCode
				,ald.attributedPracticeName
				,ald.attributedMarket
				,ald.attributedEngagement
				,ald.attributedNPI
				,ald.attributedProviderID
				,ald.attributedProviderName
				,ald.alertID
				,ald.clientCode
				,ald.LOB
				,ald.snapshotDate
				,ald.cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,ald.cdiAlertEntityID
				,ald.planMemberID
				,ald.memberName
				,ald.memberDateOfBirth
				,ald.pcpProviderID
				,ald.apptProviderID
				,ald.queriesDistributed
				,ald.queriesReturned
				,ald.appointmentDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeID
				,ald.cdiReceivedDate
				,ald.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,ald.mrrReviewDate
				,ald.alertResponseOptionID
				,ald.isApptDateCurrentYear
				,ald.isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,ald.deliveryDate
				,ald.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,ald.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,ald.queryResponseReceivedDate
				,ald.alertLineText
				,ald.alertGroupID
				,ald.hcc
				,ald.icd
				,ald.isConditionIdentified
				,ald.isConditionAddressed
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,ald.alertResponseOptionText
				,ald.alertResponseType
				,ald.reportPeriod
				,ald.filterDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeDesc
				,ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,ald.cdiStatus
				,ald.currentMonthFlag
				,ald.currentlyActive
				,ald.appointmentTypeDesc_Join
				,ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc_Join
				,ald.cdiStatus_Join
				,max(CASE WHEN md.metric = 'Alerts_Distributed' THEN countFlag ELSE NULL END) AS alertsDistributedFlag
				,max(CASE WHEN md.metric = 'Alerts_Returned' THEN countFlag ELSE NULL END) AS alertsReturnedFlag
				,max(CASE WHEN md.metric = 'Alerts_Returned_Compliant' THEN countFlag ELSE NULL END) AS alertsReturnedCompliantFlag
				,max(CASE WHEN md.metric = 'Alerts_Returned_Compliant_100%' THEN countFlag ELSE NULL END) AS alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag
				,max(CASE WHEN md.metric = 'UMAR_Qualified' THEN countFlag ELSE NULL END) AS umarQualifiedFlag
				,max(CASE WHEN md.metric = 'Incentive_Qualified' THEN countFlag ELSE NULL END ) AS incentiveQualifiedFlag
		FROM
				TMP_AlertLineDetail ald
				LEFT JOIN MetricDefs md ON ifnull(ald.AttributedMarket, 'DEFAULT') = ifnull(md.Market, 'DEFAULT')
					AND ald.appointmentTypeDesc_Join = md.appointmentTypeDesc_USE
					AND ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc_Join = md.cdiAlertStatusDesc_USE
					AND ald.cdiStatus_Join = md.cdiStatus_USE
		GROUP BY
				ald.attributedPOCode
				,ald.attributedPOName
				,ald.attributedPracticeCode
				,ald.attributedPracticeName
				,ald.attributedMarket
				,ald.attributedEngagement
				,ald.attributedNPI
				,ald.attributedProviderID
				,ald.attributedProviderName
				,ald.alertID
				,ald.clientCode
				,ald.LOB
				,ald.snapshotDate
				,ald.cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,ald.cdiAlertEntityID
				,ald.planMemberID
				,ald.memberName
				,ald.memberDateOfBirth
				,ald.pcpProviderID
				,ald.apptProviderID
				,ald.queriesDistributed
				,ald.queriesReturned
				,ald.appointmentDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeID
				,ald.cdiReceivedDate
				,ald.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,ald.mrrReviewDate
				,ald.alertResponseOptionID
				,ald.isApptDateCurrentYear
				,ald.isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,ald.deliveryDate
				,ald.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,ald.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,ald.queryResponseReceivedDate
				,ald.alertLineText
				,ald.alertGroupID
				,ald.hcc
				,ald.icd
				,ald.isConditionIdentified
				,ald.isConditionAddressed
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,ald.cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,ald.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,ald.alertResponseOptionText
				,ald.alertResponseType
				,ald.reportPeriod
				,ald.filterDate
				,ald.appointmentTypeDesc
				,ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,ald.cdiStatus
				,ald.currentMonthFlag
				,ald.currentlyActive
				,ald.appointmentTypeDesc_Join
				,ald.cdiAlertStatusDesc_Join
				,ald.cdiStatus_Join
)
,DupePriortyLkup AS(
		SELECT * 
				,replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(appointmentTypeDesc, ' ', ''), ',', ''), '-', ''), '.', ''), '–', '') AS appointmentTypeDesc_Join
				,replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(cdiAlertStatusDesc, ' ', ''), ',', ''), '-', ''), '.', ''), '–', '') AS cdiAlertStatusDesc_Join
				,replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(cdiStatus, ' ', ''), ',', ''), '-', ''), '.', ''), '–', '') AS cdiStatus_Join
		FROM DuplicatePriorityLookup
)
,FinalDup1_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				a.*,
				concat(
						year(a.filterDate)
						,'-'
						,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY attributedMarket, planMemberID, cdiAlertEntityDetailID, year(a.filterDate)
								ORDER BY a.filterDate, b.FinalRankStandard, a.appointmentDate, a.cdiReceivedDate, a.initialMedicalRecordReviewID, a.mrrReviewDate, a.alertResponseOptionText, a.isConditionAddressed )
				) AS memberApptCDIReceivedNumber
		FROM
				Final_AlertLineDetail a
				LEFT JOIN DupePriortyLkup b ON a.cdiAlertStatusDesc_Join = b.cdiAlertStatusDesc_Join
				AND a.appointmentTypeDesc_Join = b.appointmentTypeDesc_Join
				AND a.cdiStatus_Join = b.cdiStatus_Join
)
,FinalDup2_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				attributedPOCode
				,attributedPOName
				,attributedPracticeCode
				,attributedPracticeName
				,attributedMarket
				,attributedEngagement
				,attributedNPI
				,attributedProviderID
				,attributedProviderName
				,alertID
				,clientCode
				,LOB
				,snapshotDate
				,cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,cdiAlertEntityID
				,planMemberID
				,memberName
				,memberDateOfBirth
				,pcpProviderID
				,apptProviderID
				,queriesDistributed
				,queriesReturned
				,appointmentDate
				,appointmentTypeID
				,cdiReceivedDate
				,initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,mrrReviewDate
				,alertResponseOptionID
				,isApptDateCurrentYear
				,isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,deliveryDate
				,queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,queryResponseReceivedDate
				,alertLineText
				,alertGroupID
				,hcc
				,icd
				,isConditionIdentified
				,isConditionAddressed
				,cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,alertResponseOptionText
				,alertResponseType
				,reportPeriod
				,filterDate
				,appointmentTypeDesc
				,cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,cdiStatus
				,currentMonthFlag
				,currentlyActive
				,alertsDistributedFlag
				,alertsReturnedFlag
				,alertsReturnedCompliantFlag
				,alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag
				,umarQualifiedFlag
				,incentiveQualifiedFlag
				,memberApptCDIReceivedNumber
				,CASE WHEN rowNum = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS duplicateFlag
		FROM
				(
						SELECT *,
								ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY attributedMarket, planMemberID, alertID, filterDate, cdiAlertEntityDetailID ORDER BY memberApptCDIReceivedNumber DESC) AS rowNum
						FROM
								FinalDup1_AlertLineDetail
				) a
)
,FirstDOSAddressed AS(
		SELECT
				attributedMarket
				,planMemberID
				,alertID
				,hcc
				,min(filterDate) AS filterDate
		FROM
				FinalDup2_AlertLineDetail
		WHERE
				(
						isConditionAddressed = 1
						OR queriesDistributed > 0
				)
				AND alertResponseType <> 'N/A'
				AND alertsReturnedCompliantFlag = 1
		GROUP BY
				attributedMarket
				,planMemberID
				,alertID
				,hcc
)
,FinalDup3_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				a.attributedPOCode
				,a.attributedPOName
				,a.attributedPracticeCode
				,a.attributedPracticeName
				,a.attributedMarket
				,a.attributedEngagement
				,a.attributedNPI
				,a.attributedProviderID
				,a.attributedProviderName
				,a.alertID
				,a.clientCode
				,a.LOB
				,a.snapshotDate
				,a.cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,a.cdiAlertEntityID
				,a.planMemberID
				,a.memberName
				,a.memberDateOfBirth
				,a.pcpProviderID
				,a.apptProviderID
				,a.queriesDistributed
				,a.queriesReturned
				,a.appointmentDate
				,a.appointmentTypeID
				,a.cdiReceivedDate
				,a.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,a.mrrReviewDate
				,a.alertResponseOptionID
				,a.isApptDateCurrentYear
				,a.isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,a.deliveryDate
				,a.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,a.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,a.queryResponseReceivedDate
				,a.alertLineText
				,a.alertGroupID
				,a.hcc
				,a.icd
				,a.isConditionIdentified
				,a.isConditionAddressed
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,a.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,a.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,a.alertResponseOptionText
				,a.alertResponseType
				,a.reportPeriod
				,a.filterDate
				,a.appointmentTypeDesc
				,a.cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,a.cdiStatus
				,a.currentMonthFlag
				,a.currentlyActive
				,a.alertsDistributedFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedCompliantFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag
				,a.umarQualifiedFlag
				,a.incentiveQualifiedFlag
				,a.memberApptCDIReceivedNumber
				,CASE
						WHEN a.filterDate <> b.filterDate
						AND a.alertsReturnedCompliantFlag = 1
						AND a.alertsDistributedFlag = 1
						AND a.duplicateFlag = 0 THEN 2
						ELSE a.duplicateFlag
				END AS duplicateFlag
		FROM
				FinalDup2_AlertLineDetail a
				LEFT JOIN FirstDOSAddressed b ON a.attributedMarket = b.attributedMarket
				AND a.planMemberID = b.planMemberID
				AND a.alertID = b.alertID
				AND a.hcc = b.hcc
)
,FirstDOSAddressedNA AS(
		SELECT
				attributedMarket
				,planMemberID
				,alertID
				,hcc
				,min(filterDate) AS filterDate
		FROM
				FinalDup3_AlertLineDetail
		WHERE
				(
						isConditionAddressed = 1
						OR queriesDistributed > 0
				)
				AND alertResponseType = 'N/A'
				AND alertsReturnedCompliantFlag = 1
				AND duplicateFlag = 0
		GROUP BY
				attributedMarket
				,planMemberID
				,alertID
				,hcc
)
,FinalDup4_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				a.attributedPOCode
				,a.attributedPOName
				,a.attributedPracticeCode
				,a.attributedPracticeName
				,a.attributedMarket
				,a.attributedEngagement
				,a.attributedNPI
				,a.attributedProviderID
				,a.attributedProviderName
				,a.alertID
				,a.clientCode
				,a.LOB
				,a.snapshotDate
				,a.cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,a.cdiAlertEntityID
				,a.planMemberID
				,a.memberName
				,a.memberDateOfBirth
				,a.pcpProviderID
				,a.apptProviderID
				,a.queriesDistributed
				,a.queriesReturned
				,a.appointmentDate
				,a.appointmentTypeID
				,a.cdiReceivedDate
				,a.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,a.mrrReviewDate
				,a.alertResponseOptionID
				,a.isApptDateCurrentYear
				,a.isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,a.deliveryDate
				,a.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,a.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,a.queryResponseReceivedDate
				,a.alertLineText
				,a.alertGroupID
				,a.hcc
				,a.icd
				,a.isConditionIdentified
				,a.isConditionAddressed
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,a.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,a.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,a.alertResponseOptionText
				,a.alertResponseType
				,a.reportPeriod
				,a.filterDate
				,a.appointmentTypeDesc
				,a.cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,a.cdiStatus
				,a.currentMonthFlag
				,a.currentlyActive
				,a.alertsDistributedFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedCompliantFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag
				,a.umarQualifiedFlag
				,a.incentiveQualifiedFlag
				,a.memberApptCDIReceivedNumber
				,CASE
						WHEN a.filterDate <> b.filterDate
						AND a.alertsReturnedCompliantFlag = 1
						AND a.alertsDistributedFlag = 1
						AND a.duplicateFlag = 0 THEN 2
						ELSE a.duplicateFlag
				END AS duplicateFlag
		FROM
				FinalDup3_AlertLineDetail a
				LEFT JOIN FirstDOSAddressedNA b ON a.attributedMarket = b.attributedMarket
				AND a.planMemberID = b.planMemberID
				AND a.alertID = b.alertID
				AND a.hcc = b.hcc
)
,FinalDup5_AlertLineDetail AS(
		SELECT
				a.attributedPOCode
				,a.attributedPOName
				,a.attributedPracticeCode
				,a.attributedPracticeName
				,a.attributedMarket
				,a.attributedEngagement
				,a.attributedNPI
				,a.attributedProviderID
				,a.attributedProviderName
				,a.alertID
				,a.clientCode
				,a.LOB
				,a.snapshotDate
				,a.cdiAlertEntityDetailID
				,a.cdiAlertEntityID
				,a.planMemberID
				,a.memberName
				,a.memberDateOfBirth
				,a.pcpProviderID
				,a.apptProviderID
				,a.queriesDistributed
				,a.queriesReturned
				,a.appointmentDate
				,a.appointmentTypeID
				,a.cdiReceivedDate
				,a.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
				,a.mrrReviewDate
				,a.alertResponseOptionID
				,a.isApptDateCurrentYear
				,a.isReceivedDateCurrentYear
				,a.deliveryDate
				,a.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
				,a.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
				,a.queryResponseReceivedDate
				,a.alertLineText
				,a.alertGroupID
				,a.hcc
				,a.icd
				,a.isConditionIdentified
				,a.isConditionAddressed
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
				,a.cdiAlertWorkflowID
				,a.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
				,a.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
				,a.alertResponseOptionText
				,a.alertResponseType
				,a.reportPeriod
				,a.filterDate
				,a.appointmentTypeDesc
				,a.cdiAlertStatusDesc
				,a.cdiStatus
				,a.currentMonthFlag
				,a.currentlyActive
				,a.alertsDistributedFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedCompliantFlag
				,a.alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag
				,a.umarQualifiedFlag
				,a.incentiveQualifiedFlag
				,a.memberApptCDIReceivedNumber
				,a.duplicateFlag
		FROM (
				 SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY IfNull(attributedMarket,"|"), planMemberID, alertID, reportPeriod, cdiAlertWorkflowID,cdiAlertEntityDetailID
										ORDER BY IfNull(alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag,"|") DESC, IfNull(alertsReturnedCompliantFlag,"|") DESC, IfNull(alertsReturnedFlag,"|") DESC, IfNull(alertsDistributedFlag,"|") DESC, IfNull(appointmentDate,"|") DESC , IfNull(cdiReceivedDate,"|") DESC, IfNull(isConditionAddressed,"|") DESC, IfNull(isConditionIdentified,"|") DESC, IfNull(alertResponseType,"|") DESC, IfNull(attributedNPI,"|") ) rownum
							,*
				FROM FinalDup4_AlertLineDetail
				WHERE duplicateFlag = 0
				) a
		WHERE rownum = 1
)
SELECT
		reportPeriod as reportMonth
		,attributedPOCode
		,attributedPOName
		,attributedPracticeCode
		,attributedPracticeName
		,attributedMarket
		,attributedEngagement
		,attributedNPI
		,attributedProviderID
		,attributedProviderName
		,alertID
		,clientCode
		,LOB
		,snapshotDate
		,cdiAlertEntityDetailID
		,cdiAlertEntityID
		,planMemberID
		,memberName
		,memberDateOfBirth
		,pcpProviderID
		,apptProviderID
		,queriesDistributed
		,queriesReturned
		,appointmentDate
		,appointmentTypeID
		,cdiReceivedDate
		,initialMedicalRecordReviewID
		,mrrReviewDate
		,alertResponseOptionID
		,isApptDateCurrentYear
		,isReceivedDateCurrentYear
		,deliveryDate
		,queryReceivedFromCoderDate
		,queryForwardedToDoctorDate
		,queryResponseReceivedDate
		,alertLineText
		,alertGroupID
		,hcc
		,icd
		,isConditionIdentified
		,isConditionAddressed
		,cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
		,cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
		,cdiAlertWorkflowID
		,cdiAlertQueryCodeID
		,cdiAlertQueryResponseID
		,alertResponseOptionText
		,alertResponseType
		,filterDate
		,appointmentTypeDesc
		,cdiAlertStatusDesc
		,cdiStatus
		,currentMonthFlag
		,currentlyActive
		,alertsDistributedFlag
		,alertsReturnedFlag
		,alertsReturnedCompliantFlag
		,alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag
		,umarQualifiedFlag
		,incentiveQualifiedFlag
		,memberApptCDIReceivedNumber
		,duplicateFlag
		,sha2(
				concat(
						IfNull(reportPeriod, "|"),"|"
						,IfNull(attributedPOCode, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedPOName, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedPracticeCode, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedPracticeName, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedMarket, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedEngagement, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedNPI, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedProviderID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(attributedProviderName, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(clientCode, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(LOB, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(snapshotDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertEntityDetailID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertEntityID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(planMemberID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(memberName, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(memberDateOfBirth, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(pcpProviderID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(apptProviderID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(queriesDistributed, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(queriesReturned, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(appointmentDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(appointmentTypeID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiReceivedDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(initialMedicalRecordReviewID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(mrrReviewDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertResponseOptionID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(isApptDateCurrentYear, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(isReceivedDateCurrentYear, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(deliveryDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(queryReceivedFromCoderDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(queryForwardedToDoctorDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(queryResponseReceivedDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertLineText, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertGroupID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(hcc, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(icd, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(isConditionIdentified, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(isConditionAddressed, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertWorkflowID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertQueryCodeID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertQueryResponseID, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertResponseOptionText, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertResponseType, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(filterDate, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(appointmentTypeDesc, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiAlertStatusDesc, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cdiStatus, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(currentMonthFlag, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(cast(currentlyActive as string), "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertsDistributedFlag, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertsReturnedFlag, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertsReturnedCompliantFlag, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(umarQualifiedFlag, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(incentiveQualifiedFlag, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(memberApptCDIReceivedNumber, "|"), "|"
						,IfNull(duplicateFlag, "|")
						),256
		) AS hashKey
FROM
		FinalDup5_AlertLineDetail
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
select 1
from tempSQLScript
group by ReportMonth
		,Alertid
		,CDIAlertWorkflowID
		,CDIAlertEntityDetailID
		,IfNull(AttributedMarket, 'Not Available')
having count(*) > 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript) s ON 
				IfNull(s.reportMonth,"|") = IfNull(t.reportMonth,"|")
				AND IfNull(s.alertID,"|") = IfNull(t.alertID,"|")
				AND IfNull(s.clientCode,"|") = IfNull(t.clientCode,"|")
				AND IfNull(s.cdiAlertWorkflowID,"|") = IfNull(t.cdiAlertWorkflowID,"|")
				AND IfNull(s.CDIAlertEntityDetailID,"|") = IfNull(t.CDIAlertEntityDetailID,"|")
				AND IfNull(s.AttributedMarket,"|") = IfNull(t.AttributedMarket,"|")
WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey 
THEN	
UPDATE SET
		reportMonth = s.reportMonth
		,attributedPOCode = s.attributedPOCode
		,attributedPOName = s.attributedPOName
		,attributedPracticeCode = s.attributedPracticeCode
		,attributedPracticeName = s.attributedPracticeName
		,attributedMarket = s.attributedMarket
		,attributedEngagement = s.attributedEngagement
		,attributedNPI = s.attributedNPI
		,attributedProviderID = s.attributedProviderID
		,attributedProviderName = s.attributedProviderName
		,alertID = s.alertID
		,clientCode = s.clientCode
		,LOB = s.LOB
		,snapshotDate = s.snapshotDate
		,cdiAlertEntityDetailID = s.cdiAlertEntityDetailID
		,cdiAlertEntityID = s.cdiAlertEntityID
		,planMemberID = s.planMemberID
		,memberName = s.memberName
		,memberDateOfBirth = s.memberDateOfBirth
		,pcpProviderID = s.pcpProviderID
		,apptProviderID = s.apptProviderID
		,queriesDistributed = s.queriesDistributed
		,queriesReturned = s.queriesReturned
		,appointmentDate = s.appointmentDate
		,appointmentTypeID = s.appointmentTypeID
		,cdiReceivedDate = s.cdiReceivedDate
		,initialMedicalRecordReviewID = s.initialMedicalRecordReviewID
		,mrrReviewDate = s.mrrReviewDate
		,alertResponseOptionID = s.alertResponseOptionID
		,isApptDateCurrentYear = s.isApptDateCurrentYear
		,isReceivedDateCurrentYear = s.isReceivedDateCurrentYear
		,deliveryDate = s.deliveryDate
		,queryReceivedFromCoderDate = s.queryReceivedFromCoderDate
		,queryForwardedToDoctorDate = s.queryForwardedToDoctorDate
		,queryResponseReceivedDate = s.queryResponseReceivedDate
		,alertLineText = s.alertLineText
		,alertGroupID = s.alertGroupID
		,hcc = s.hcc
		,icd = s.icd
		,isConditionIdentified = s.isConditionIdentified
		,isConditionAddressed = s.isConditionAddressed
		,cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID = s.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID
		,cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID = s.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID
		,cdiAlertWorkflowID = s.cdiAlertWorkflowID
		,cdiAlertQueryCodeID = s.cdiAlertQueryCodeID
		,cdiAlertQueryResponseID = s.cdiAlertQueryResponseID
		,alertResponseOptionText = s.alertResponseOptionText
		,alertResponseType = s.alertResponseType
		,filterDate = s.filterDate
		,appointmentTypeDesc = s.appointmentTypeDesc
		,cdiAlertStatusDesc = s.cdiAlertStatusDesc
		,cdiStatus = s.cdiStatus
		,currentMonthFlag = s.currentMonthFlag
		,currentlyActive = s.currentlyActive
		,alertsDistributedFlag = s.alertsDistributedFlag
		,alertsReturnedFlag = s.alertsReturnedFlag
		,alertsReturnedCompliantFlag = s.alertsReturnedCompliantFlag
		,alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag = s.alertsReturnedCompliant100pctFlag
		,umarQualifiedFlag = s.umarQualifiedFlag
		,incentiveQualifiedFlag = s.incentiveQualifiedFlag
		,memberApptCDIReceivedNumber = s.memberApptCDIReceivedNumber
		,duplicateFlag = s.duplicateFlag
		,hashKey = s.hashKey
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
		reportMonth
		,attributedPOCode
		,attributedPOName
		,attributedPracticeCode
		,attributedPracticeName

)
